data.body: As title says, and even though this is a child and parent beat, neither the parent nor it's children are shown, so it doesn't really make sense to show it.  Obviouslly a shipped beat is not active, and if it's listed as active because it has active chilrden or parent, then show them too.  either way it's a confusing bug.
data.title: Active Screen:  Maestro repo shows 3b3b.2, which is shipped
